text:
Petunia is a Titan appearing in Attack on Playtime, the seventh short story of Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Petunia has short black hair and later wears Hodge's school uniform which consists in a blue top with a matching long skirt and white socks and shoes.

Story

Petunia appears in literature class when Hodge calls her and devours the teacher, Mr. Pikeoil. The two of them then go to gym class and Petunia rips off the roof. She grabs Mrs. Locksnipe, the teacher, and eats her.

Petunia and Hodge then go to the cafeteria and eat together. They are interrupted by a mad Razorbait but Petunia eats him as well and shows his dead body to the students. All of them then go outside to play with her after getting Petunia a uniform.

People killed

Pikeoil
Locksnipe
Razorbait
